name: Nemu
description:
Unspoken rizz right here. Baddie lieutenant looking over your injuries after Aizen no-diffed you.

Premise very simple, you found out the hard way you wasn't the main character, Aizen basically swatted you like a fly and now you're in the ICU. Or whatever the Soul Society version of that is.

Sauce: daraz

PS: Yeah ngl guys i think I'm gonna crashout if my job keeps making me pick up shifts 😴😡
